title: Admissions
text:
Title: Admissions
UG Eligibility: Passed 10+2 examination with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of Chemistry / Biotechnology / Biology, with at least 45 percent marks taken together; reserved category candidates require 40 percent. Lateral Entry Eligibility: Diploma from an AICTE or DOTE approved institution with at least 50 percent marks, or B.Sc. degree from a recognized university with Mathematics at XII level and at least 50 percent marks; reserved category candidates require 45 percent. Additional conditions for B.Sc. stream students are listed on the official admission page. MCA Eligibility: Recognized Bachelor's Degree of minimum 3 years duration with Mathematics at 10+2 level and at least 50 percent in the qualifying examination; reserved category candidates require 45 percent. MBA Eligibility: Recognized Bachelor's Degree of minimum 3 years duration with at least 50 percent in the qualifying examination; reserved category candidates require 45 percent.
notes: Eligibility and programme details extracted from the approved admission page.

title: Admissions
text:
UG Programmes: B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering (CSE); B.Tech Information Technology (IT); B.Tech Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE); B.Tech Bio-Medical Engineering (BME); B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (AI&DS); B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AI&ML)
PG Programmes: M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering (CSE); M.Tech Wireless Communication (WC); MCA; MBA
Admission Cycle: 2026-27
Age Limit: General age limit shown on the official page: 21 years for first year admission and 24 years for lateral entry as on 1st July of the academic year under consideration; SC/ST candidates have 3 years relaxation. MCA and MBA are listed with no age limit. Office Name: Admissions
notes: Eligibility and programme details extracted from the approved admission page.

title: Eligibility for Admission
text: Title: Eligibility for Admission Source URL: https://www.rgcet.edu.in/pages-admission.php Admission inquiry note on the page: - 2026-27 Admission Open First semester B.Tech degree programme eligibility: - Passed 10+2 examination with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects - One of Chemistry / Biotechnology / Biology along with the compulsory subjects - At least 45 percent marks in the above subjects taken together - Reserved category candidates: 40 percent in the above subjects taken together Lateral entry into third semester of the eight semester B.Tech programme: - Diploma examination from an AICTE approved institution or DOTE approved with at least 50 percent marks - Reserved category candidates: 45 percent - B.Sc. degree from a recognized university defined by UGC with at least 50 percent marks and XII standard with Mathematics - Reserved category candidates: 45 percent - B.Sc. stream students shall clear Engineering Graphics / Engineering Drawing and Engineering Mechanics of the first year engineering programme along with second year subjects - B.Sc. stream students are considered after filling the supernumerary seats in this category with students from the Diploma stream - Students who have passed Diploma in Engineering and Technology or B.Sc.
notes: Eligibility, programme list, age limits, and contact details extracted.

title: Eligibility for Admission
text: degree are also eligible for first year Engineering Degree courses subject to vacancies if lateral entry vacancies are exhausted MCA eligibility: - Recognized Bachelor's Degree of minimum 3 years duration - Mathematics at 10+2 level - At least 50 percent at the qualifying examination - Reserved category candidates: 45 percent MBA eligibility: - Recognized Bachelor's Degree of minimum 3 years duration - At least 50 percent at the qualifying examination - Reserved category candidates: 45 percent Undergraduate courses listed on the page: - B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) - B.Tech Information Technology (IT) - B.Tech Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) - B.Tech Bio-Medical Engineering (BME) - B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (AI&DS) - B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AI&ML) Postgraduate courses listed on the page: - M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) - M.Tech Wireless Communication (WC) - MCA - MBA Age limit details on the page: - Candidates should not have completed 21 years of age as on 1st July of the academic year under consideration - Lateral entry candidates should not have completed 24 years as on 1st July of the academic year under consideration - SC/ST candidates have a relaxation of 3 years in both cases - MCA: No age limit - MBA: No age limit Admission contact shown on the page: - Dr. K.
notes: Eligibility, programme list, age limits, and contact details extracted.

title: Health Service
text:

Facility Name: Health Service

notes: Health service details extracted from the approved facilities page.

title: Hostel Facilities
text:

Facility Name: Hostel Facilities
Location: Campus hostel facilities
notes: Only the limited hostel description explicitly present on the approved facilities page is included here.

title: Facilities For Students
text: Title: Facilities For Students Source URL: https://www.rgcet.edu.in/pages-facilities.php Students Grievance Cell: - The grievance cell looks into student grievances - Students may also express grievances online through the grievance form mentioned on the page Health Service: - The college doctor will be available in the college campus for consultation - Students can seek advice from the Medical Officer any time - Regular health check-ups will be conducted for students - Students can consult the college doctor even after college hours at his chamber - Hospital services are available at Mahatma Gandhi Medical College and Research Institute nearby the campus Transport: - The college has a fleet of 18 buses - Buses transport students and staff from various parts of the city and neighbouring areas to the college and back home - College bus facility is available to every student - The facility is extended for special coaching classes, placements and training, and campus drive occasions Internet Service: - Member of the National Knowledge Network (NKN) - NKN bandwidth: 40 Mbps - Additional BSNL internet connection: 100 Mbps - Network traffic is monitored and controlled through a firewall - A fiber-optic backbone has been laid to provide connectivity to various parts of the campus WiFi Connectivity: - Access points have been deployed in a few blocks in the campus Hostel Facilities: - The institution provides hostel facilities for boys and girls - Vegetarian food is provided - Lunch is provided inside the campus for all students - A separate hostel building with One Lakh Sq.
notes: Facilities sections extracted from approved page.

title: Facilities For Students
text: ft. is described as being constructed and ready for occupation in the near future
notes: Facilities sections extracted from approved page.

title: Application for Claim of Attendance on Medical Grounds
text:
Title: Application for Claim of Attendance on Medical Grounds
Description: Official form to claim attendance on medical grounds.
Official Download Link: https://www.rgcet.edu.in/App_to_claim_medical_attendance.pdf
Condonation Rule: The page states that students with overall attendance greater than 60 percent and less than 75 percent alone are eligible for condonation of attendance on medical grounds.
Item Name: Application for Claim of Attendance on Medical Grounds
Submission Rule: The completed and signed application should be submitted to the office of the Principal through the Head of the Department within three days of resuming attendance.
notes: Official PDF extracted from the approved link.

title: No Dues Exam Hall Ticket
text:

Usage Note: The PDF states that the temporary hall ticket is valid for model examination only and should be retained carefully.
Item Name: No Dues Exam Hall Ticket
Required Clearances: Accounts, Hostel, Library, Sports, RECOFES, Placement Officer, Scholarship/Record Section, and Examination Wing are listed in the form.
notes: Official PDF extracted from the approved link.

title: Application for Bonafide Certificate
text: Approved / NotApproved Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering and Technology Kirumampakkam, Puducherry Application for Bonafide Certificate Date: Name of the Student (Capital letters) Registration Number Degree B.TECH / M.TECH / MBA / MCA Branch CSE / IT / MECH / ECE / EEE / BME / MBA / MCA Year & Semester Y1/Y2/Y3/Y4 S1/S2/S3/S4/S5/S6/S7/S8 Quota CENTAC / MANAGEMENT Purpose of Applying (Passport/Educational Loan/Scholarship/ Fees Structure/Others specify Enclose Supporting Documents: 1. title: Application for college transfer from DBRAIT for Provisional admission at RGCET
text: Title: Application for college transfer from DBRAIT for Provisional admission at RGCET Source URL: http://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScqCk6KDPZtSmtAKZOHnXtA4FkJXbG84i5fzswBbzb99bIqLQ/viewform Official Google Form purpose: - Application for college transfer from DBRAIT for Provisional admission at RGCET Notes shown on the form: - Admission through transfer is subject to fulfillment of eligible conditions of Pondicherry University - After completion of official formalities and approval for transfer from Pondicherry University, admission will be confirmed - The student can attend classes in person by paying the necessary tuition fees
notes: Google Form purpose and transfer notes captured.

title: Application for Claim of Attendance on Medical Grounds
text: RAJIV GANDHI COLLEGE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY KIRUMAMPAKKAM, PUDUCHERRY APPLICATION FOR CLAIM OF ATTENDANCE ON MEDICAL GROUNDS Date of application: From To, The Principal, Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering and Technology Puducherry THROUGH THE HEAD OF THE DEPARTMENT Respected Sir, I could not attend my regular classes from ______________ to _______________ (both days inclusive) on account of the following illness :_____________________________ __________________________________________________________________. Medical Certificate dated _______________ issued by Dr.___________________________________ as required by rules is herewith attached. Yours faithfully, (Signature of Student) (Countersign of Parent/ Guardian) (P.T.O.) ….2…. Rules: 1. Fully completed and signed application form should be submitted to the office of the Principal through the Head of the Department concerned during office hours on any working day within THREE DAYS of resuming attendance. 2. An official receipt will be given by the office on submission of application. The receipt should be preserved by the student. 3. Medical Certificate without specifying the exact dates will not be accepted. 4. If student is absent for more than three days, details of medical report – pathology test, X-ray reports etc. should be submitted. 5.
notes: PDF text extracted with rules and submission conditions.

title: Application for Claim of Attendance on Medical Grounds
text: Candidates who secure overall attendance greater than 60% and less than 75% alone will be eligible for condonation of attendance on medical grounds. 6. Medical Certificate should be issued by a medical officer not below the rank of Assistant Director. *********************************
notes: PDF text extracted with rules and submission conditions.

title: No Dues Exam Hall Ticket
text: RAJIV GANDHI COLLEGE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY Pondy-Cuddalore Main Road, Kirumampakkam, Puducherry – 607 403 EXAMINATION HALL TICKET Name (As per PU online registration) Registration Number Degree B.TECH / M.TECH / MBA / MCA Branch UG: AI&DS / AI&ML / BME / CSE / ECE / IT / EEE PG: MBA / MCA / WC Year & Semester Y1/Y2/Y3/Y4 S1/S2/S3/S4/S5/S6/S7/S8 Date of Birth (DD/MM/YYYY) Signature of the Student HOD Signature Chief Superintendent of Exams THIS HALL TICKET IS VALID FOR MODEL EXAMINATION ONLY Please retain this Temporary Hall Ticket carefully The Students Performance Report given overleaf should be duly signed by appropriates authorities of RGCET in order to receive the original Hall Ticket The original Hall Ticket should be collected only after submitting this Hall Ticket INTERNAL EXAMINATION ATTENDANCE Sl. Name of the Student 2. Department/Year/Semester 3. Register Number 4. Attendance % (To be filled by Class Coordinators) 5.
notes: PDF text extracted with form requirements.

title: No Dues Exam Hall Ticket
text: Student with attendance below 60-75% are required to submit a valid medical certificate Yes / No Progress Report (Teacher’s Concerned) Theory /Practical Conduct and Character Attendance Academic Performance Recommendation of the Teacher 6. T1 7. T2 8. T3 9. T4 10. T5 11. T6 12. P1 13. P2 14. P3 Recommendation of the HOD 14. Conduct and Character 15. Attendance % 16. Academic Performance No Dues 17.Accounts 18. Hostel 19. Library 20.Sports 21.RECOFES 22. Placement Officer 23. title: No Dues Exam Hall Ticket
text: 25.Receipt of all Semester Marksheet/Provisional Certificate & Consolidated Marksheet Recommendation of the PRINCIPAL Certified that the above-mentioned student has i) Secured more than 75% overall attendance ii) His/her progress is satisfactory and he/she has satisfactorily completed the course of study in all subjects pertaining to the current semester iii) His conduct is found to be satisfactory iv) He has registered for the university examinations of the previous semester in all the subjects as well as for all arrear subjects SATISFACTORY : HALL TICKED MAY BE ISSUED NOT SATISFACTORY : DO NOT ISSUE HALL TICKET PRINCIPAL Page 2 of 2
notes: PDF text extracted with form requirements.

title: Admission Office Location Support
text:
Title: Admission Office Location Support
Content: For admission enquiry, the approved admission contact page points students to the RGCET campus at Pondy - Cuddalore Main Road, Kirumampakkam, Pondicherry-607 403, India. The exact room location of the admission office is not separately published in the current approved sources.
Topic: Admission Office Location Support
notes: Admission office location support summary derived from the approved admission contact page.

title: College Location Support
text:
Title: College Location Support
Content: RGCET is located at Pondy - Cuddalore Main Road, Kirumampakkam, Pondicherry-607 403, India. The home page also describes the campus as being about 13 Kms from Pondicherry towards Cuddalore on East Coast Road.
Topic: College Location Support
notes: College location support summary derived from the approved home page and contact page.

title: HOD Information Support
text:
Title: HOD Information Support
Content: The currently approved department pages do not publish confirmed HOD names for the departments covered in this chatbot. For the latest department leadership details, please contact the college office at info@rgcetpdy.ac.in or (0413) 2615 308, 309.

notes: Support-style record for HOD queries. Approved department gallery pages do not publish confirmed HOD names in the current sources.

title: Institution Overview
text:
Title: Institution Overview
Content: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering and Technology is presented on the official website as an institution under Sri Balaji Educational and Charitable Public Trust. The campus is at Kirumambakkam, 13 Kms from Pondicherry towards Cuddalore on East Coast Road, on 30 acres of land with about 2,25,000 Sq. ft. of construction.
Topic: Institution Overview
notes: Institution overview extracted from the approved home page.

title: Trust and Leadership
text:
Title: Trust and Leadership
Content: The About Us page names Dr. E. Vijayakrishna Rapaka as Principal, Shri. M. K. Rajagopalan as Chairman, and Professor. Dr. K. Ayyappan as Vice-Principal.
Topic: Trust and Leadership
notes: Named leadership extracted from the approved About Us page.

title: Principal Support

title: Tell me about the placement cell.
text:
Question: Tell me about the placement cell.
Answer: The Centre for Training, Placement, and Corporate Relations (CTPCR) organizes training programmes, campus placements, career counseling, aptitude and interview preparation, internships, and industry collaboration. Placement contact email: placementcell@rgcetpdy.ac.in.
notes: Answer derived only from the approved placement about and contact pages.

title: Higher Studies Record Page
text: Title: Higher Studies Record Page Source URL: https://www.rgcet.edu.in/hs.php Official page summary: - Higher studies list yearwise for last five years - Higher studies certificate yearwise links are shown on the page - Years shown on the page: 2018-19, 2019-20, 2020-21, 2021-22, 2022-23, 2023-24 The page provides download links for higher studies records by year.
notes: Official higher studies record page summarized conservatively.

title: Placement Cell About
text: Title: Centre for Training Placement and Corporate Relations Source URL: https://www.rgcet.edu.in/placementcell_about.php Vision: - To empower students with industry-relevant skills, professional competence, and ethical values through comprehensive training and placement opportunities, fostering global career success and contributing to societal development Mission points on the page: - Build strong industry-academic collaborations for placement and internship opportunities - Provide personalized career counseling, soft skills training, and technical skill development programmes - Nurture leadership, teamwork, and problem-solving abilities - Promote lifelong learning, adaptability, and innovation - Ensure equal placement opportunities while upholding ethical and professional standards About the Centre for Training, Placement, and Corporate Relations (CTPCR): - Serves as a bridge between academia and industry - Organizes training programmes such as workshops, seminars, and certification courses - Facilitates campus placements - Supports industry collaboration, internships, and live projects - Provides career counseling - Organizes aptitude and interview preparation - Promotes higher education guidance - Supports entrepreneurship - Encourages alumni engagement - Tracks industry trends - Conducts corporate outreach Notable recruiters listed on the page: - TCS - CTS - Capgemini - Accenture - Société Générale - HCL - Wipro - Zifo R&D - Tata Elxsi - ATOS - Hexaware - Renault Nissan Technology and Business Solutions - KAAR Technologies - Deloitte - Infosys
notes: CTPCR vision, mission, functions, and notable recruiters extracted.

title: Placement Cell Contact

notes: Placement contact email and general contact details extracted.

title: Placement Record Page

title: Qualifying Examinations Record Page
text: Title: Qualifying Examinations Record Page Source URL: https://www.rgcet.edu.in/qe.php Official page summary: - Students qualifying in state, national, or international level examinations during the last five years - Examples listed on the page include IIT JAM, NET, SLET, GATE, GMAT, GPAT, CLAT, CAT, GRE, TOEFL, IELTS, Civil Services, and State Government examinations - Years shown on the page: 2018-19, 2019-20, 2020-21, 2021-22, 2022-23 The page provides download links for last five years student name lists and year-wise qualifying examination records.
notes: Official qualifying examinations page summarized conservatively.
